section.approach.title: From Heuristics to LLMs
section.approach.step1.label: Heuristic
section.approach.step1.desc: Hand-crafted rules and search algorithms as strong baselines.
section.approach.step2.label: Reinforcement Learning
section.approach.step2.desc: Self-play and policy optimization to surpass heuristic performance.
section.approach.step3.label: LLM Agents
section.approach.step3.desc: Large language models as game-playing agents with strategic reasoning.

about.title: Trace Studio
about.mission.title: About
about.mission.body: Trace Studio is an open-source research group building game AI systems. We develop high-performance game engines, train AI solvers using heuristic search, reinforcement learning, and large language models, and publish technique reports documenting our methods and findings.
about.scope.title: Project Scope
about.scope.body: Every Trace Studio game repository follows a four-part structure: (1) a high-performance game engine, (2) heuristic and learned solvers, (3) a web demo, and (4) a technique report.
about.philosophy.title: Methodology
about.philosophy.body: We approach each game by first establishing strong heuristic baselines, then training reinforcement learning agents, and finally exploring LLM-based game play. This progression ensures rigorous benchmarking at every stage.
about.contact.title: Get Involved
about.contact.body: Trace Studio is open to contributors. Visit our GitHub organization to explore projects, open issues, or submit pull requests.
